issues.description: Missing RevealFromHand action to reveal top card of deck. The effect must first reveal 1 card from deck before conditionally attaching DON!!
Missing condition to check if revealed card's type includes 'Whitebeard Pirates'. AttachDon should only occur if this condition is met
AttachDon target must be restricted to rested DON!! cards only. Current target allows any character/leader. Target should specify 'rested' constraint or use conditional logic
